nodes.name: LC
nodes.summary: LC表示 IUCN 无危等级，当前关联8208种鸟类，如鸵鸟、鸸鹋、南方鶴鴕等8208种鸟类。

nodes.name: 朗多尼亚州
nodes.summary: 朗多尼亚州是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联34种鸟类，包括Red-throated piping guan、肉垂鳳冠雉、Blue-necked jacamar等34种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: 马代拉河

nodes.name: Gallery forest
nodes.summary: Gallery forest是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联206种鸟类，包括Blue-throated piping guan、White-throated piping guan、黑額鳴冠雉等206种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: 纳氏蚁鵙
nodes.summary: 纳氏蚁鵙（Natterer's slaty antshrike，学名 Thamnophilus stictocephalus），在图谱中标记为无危（LC）物种，已关联9个分布地点节点。

nodes.name: 托坎廷斯河

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: The nominate subspecies of Natterer's slaty antshrike is found in Brazil south of the Amazon between the Madeira and Tocantins rivers and southwest into Rondônia and northern and western Mato Grosso Brazilian states and northern Beni Department in extreme northern Bolivia

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: Along the Amazon it mostly occurs in patches of forest on white-sand soil, on the edges of humid evergreen forest, and in forest clearings such as those caused by fallen trees
